evals.prompt: 帮我写一篇小红书，方向 A，用这周的睡眠数据
evals.expected_output: 生成一篇关于睡眠/自律的小红书帖子，包含从近期日志中提取的真实睡眠数据，保存到 ventures/xhs-content/ 目录
expectations: Output is a markdown file with YAML frontmatter containing direction, title, date, data_sources, tags, and status fields
Title is ≤20 Chinese characters and has a hook (uses numbers, questions, or first-person)
Post contains at least 3 specific data points from actual daily logs (e.g., sleep duration, HRV, sleep debt numbers)
All numbers in the post can be traced back to actual values in daily/*.md or reports/*.md
Post uses short paragraphs (2-3 lines each), includes emojis, and has a conversational Chinese tone
Post body is between 300-800 characters (excluding frontmatter and image suggestions)
Post includes image/card suggestions section describing what visuals to create
Post is saved to ventures/xhs-content/YYYY-MM-DD-{slug}.md with proper slug naming

evals.prompt: batch — 这周有什么值得发小红书的？
evals.expected_output: 扫描近期日志数据，输出 3-5 个选题推荐，每个包含数据亮点、钩子角度和大纲，覆盖不同方向
expectations: Output contains 3-5 distinct post ideas/topics
Ideas cover at least 2 different content directions (A/B/C/D)
Each idea includes specific data points extracted from recent daily logs or reports
Each idea includes a hook angle explaining why this data has viral/engagement potential
Each idea includes a brief outline with 3-4 key points
Batch mode outputs to conversation only, does NOT create files in ventures/xhs-content/
Output ends with an invitation for the user to pick which idea to fully generate

evals.prompt: 出一篇小红书，方向 D，主题是 meal prep 成本精算
evals.expected_output: 生成一篇关于程序员低成本增肌饮食的帖子，包含真实食材单价和每日热量数据，有配图建议和标签
expectations: Output is a markdown file with YAML frontmatter containing direction: D, title, date, data_sources, tags, and status fields
Title is ≤20 Chinese characters and has a hook (uses numbers like RM amounts, or a surprising cost figure)
Post references actual grocery unit prices from user_profile.md (e.g., chicken breast RM15/kg, eggs RM0.23 each)
Post includes a calculated daily or weekly food cost breakdown using real spending data from daily logs
Post includes calorie or macro estimates alongside cost data
Post uses short paragraphs, emojis, conversational Chinese tone with English technical terms
Post includes image/card suggestions (e.g., cost breakdown table, meal photo suggestions)
Post is saved to ventures/xhs-content/YYYY-MM-DD-{slug}.md with proper slug naming
